pages.raw_text:
Spokane Express and Truckmen's
union has decided to change it's name
to the Spokane Express and Truck
Drivers and Swampers' union. No.
500. The trades council recently re-


fused TO admit this union for the


reason that 1t was composed ex-
clusively of employers. Under the


new name, the organization believes


that 1t meets all the requirements of


the council Hereafter it will take


in not only BOSSES but drivers of ex-
press wagons and trucks and also
swampers. The new union has re-
solved to raise the present scale. 1t
is proposed to raise the price OF haul
ing trunks chests. valises, boxes and
articles OF that description. The raise
will consist in charging SO cents in
stead Of IS cents for trunks that are
hauled from one to twelve blocks
For every mile beyond i2 blocks rs
cents will be added.
